title: 狐假虎威
meaning: 比喻仰仗别人的权势来欺压人

scenes.title: 狐狸骑虎
scenes.prompt: Chinese children book illustration, cute cartoon style, warm colors, consistent art style, a sly orange fox riding on back of a large striped tiger, forest path, fox looking proud, tiger confused
scenes.narration: 狐狸骑在老虎背上，在森林里走。

scenes.title: 动物害怕
scenes.prompt: Chinese children book illustration, cute cartoon style, warm colors, consistent art style, forest animals rabbit deer bear running away in fear from the tiger with fox on its back, dramatic scene
scenes.narration: 其他动物看到都吓得逃跑。

scenes.title: 真相大白
scenes.prompt: Chinese children book illustration, cute cartoon style, warm colors, consistent art style, the tiger looking angry at the scared orange fox who is trembling, fox exposed, forest background
scenes.narration: 老虎发现真相后，狐狸再也不敢骗人了。
